name: Kangaroo Tail Curried
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the kangaroo tail thoroughly.
2. Blanch the tail in boiling water for 5 minutes, then drain well.
3. In a large pot or stewpan, melt butter over medium heat.
4. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent (about 5 minutes).
5. Sprinkle curry powder evenly over the onions and stir frequently to coat.
6. Cook the mixture for an additional 10-15 minutes, stirring often.
7. Place the kangaroo tail in the pot and add lemon juice, salt, and stock.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for at least 2 hours or until tender.
9. Add diced sour apple and stir gently.
10. Adjust seasoning if necessary and cook until done.
11. Remove from heat and arrange kangaroo tail pieces on a hot serving dish.
12. Strain the sauce over the meat and serve with boiled rice.
Time: From 2 to 3 hours.
